message:
refactor(storage): route event annotation writes through cx entry

Extends the ft-xbnl0.2.3 cx-first migration to the four event annotation
writer shims: under `asupersync-runtime`, `set_event_triage_state`,
`set_event_note`, `add_event_label`, and `remove_event_label` now delegate
to their `_with_cx` siblings so each write passes through `send_with_cx`
and honors `cx.checkpoint()`.
